name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
In stock!!️
Caro series pearl chain camera bag, classic trellis pattern, every metal chain link of the strap is embellished with a small pearl, exquisite and luxurious from every angle, carefully crafted from imported cowhide, combining elegance and practicality, strap and handle are detachable, allowing you to switch between multiple styles at will
size: 19*13*4.5cm
